subject: Payment for last video?
body_preview: Hi Theo, just checking when the payment for my last video will be sent? I haven't been paid yet and wanted to confirm the timing.

subject: My rate for the collab
body_preview: Hey Theo, my rate is $600 per video until 15 July, after that it goes up. Let me know if that works for the partnership.

subject: Tracking link for the campaign
body_preview: Could you send me the tracking link for the campaign so I can add it to the video description before I publish?

subject: Credits issue
body_preview: I think I redeemed my credits in the wrong place and now I can't find them in my account. Can you help me sort this out?

subject: Posting question
body_preview: Quick one, will the video be posted on the CryptoVistaHub channel? Want to make sure we are aligned before I share it around.

subject: Collaboration structure
body_preview: Hi Theo, I'd love to understand how your collaboration structure works before we move forward. What does a typical deal look like?

subject: Quick call this week?
body_preview: Are you available for a quick call this week to align on the campaign? Let me know a good time and I'll send an invite.

subject: Can't log in
body_preview: I can't log in to the dashboard to access the product. Do you need a screenshot of the error I'm getting?

subject: Feedback on the cut?
body_preview: Could you review the latest cut and share your feedback when you get a chance? Hoping to lock it by tomorrow.

subject: This week in Web3
body_preview: Your weekly digest of the top crypto and Web3 stories. Read the highlights below. Unsubscribe anytime.

subject: Re: Payment for last video?
body_preview: Hi Theo, just following up again — it's been a few days since your last note and I still haven't seen the payment come through.
